title: Simpliest Homes
description: Just SetHome command for everyone. No one making this for only one home, so now someone made!
body:
Tired of setting up every ime u setup server max homes to one? tired of all this unnecessary features?

This mod is for u then its simple and basic mod allow every player for only one home, only one feature is 5s cooldown or not

it can be configured.

For modpack makers: u can use this mod in your modpack but only on CurseForge


```

```

                             Porting this to other version may take some time so stay tuned

                             This feature is added from my other mod OVERWORLD HOME

I remove overworld home mod after porting this mod to other versions that Overworld Home work

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Planned version is all popular from 1.12.2 to the latest
